risks: Images missing 'alt' attributes for accessibility (e.g., product images, favicons).
Labels in Log In form (Username, Password) have 'for' attributes that do not match input 'id' attributes, affecting accessibility.
Duplicate 'id' attributes (e.g., 'itemc' for category links, 'example-video_component_430') violating HTML standards and potentially causing script failures.
Video player elements using 'tabindex="-1"' may hinder keyboard navigation for accessibility.
Semantic HTML issues: 'h2' for product name instead of 'h1' on product page, 'h4' for product prices.
Product description text truncation ('overflow: hidden') might hide information from users.
Reliance on inline 'onclick' JavaScript for core interactions without progressive enhancement.
Potential low color contrast in header navigation links against the gradient background.
